candidates.why: This is a separate operating D&A line, but it appears below Gross profit rather than within the cost-of-revenues section. That placement suggests it is not a COGS subcomponent to add to the already selected 'Cost of revenues/COGS' row.
Component of the separate D&A block, but not specifically tied to COGS and appears below Gross profit. Also subordinate to the summary 'Depreciation and Writedowns'.
Component of the separate D&A block and more likely overhead/SG&A-related than COGS-related; also subordinate to the summary D&A row.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. The explicit D&A rows are presented separately below Gross profit, so they do not appear to be COGS D&A that should be added to the COGS bucket.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line shown at the same level as other operating expense lines and outside the selected XSGA component rows ('Employee benefit expenses' and 'Other external expenses'). It appears to be the summary row for D&A and should be preferred over component rows to avoid double counting.
Likely a component of 'Depreciation and Writedowns' because the values largely roll into the summary row. Do not choose if the summary row is selected.
Likely another component of 'Depreciation and Writedowns'; should not be chosen separately when the summary row is available.
Minor/zero component within the same D&A block, subordinate to the summary row.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA reference bucket uses only 'Employee benefit expenses' and 'Other external expenses'. The D&A block is shown separately in the operating section, so it appears outside those selected SG&A components and should be added separately. 'Depreciation and Writedowns' is preferred as the summary row over its components.
